name: You Monster!
author: Poki
description: You Monster! is an action game where you become the monster! Devour zombies to grow bigger and stronger, then battle other terrifying monsters until only one remains standing. Use your victories to upgrade yourself and evolve into an unstoppable beast. Ready to feed, fight, and dominate? Become the last monster standing now! How to play You Monster!? Click to move and attack! Who created You Monster!? You Monster! is created by Shoom Games. Play their other games on Poki: Mine Line and War of Sticks ! How can I play You Monster! for free? You can play You Monster! for free on Poki. Can I play You Monster! on mobile devices and desktop? You Monster! can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
